prompt: I run a cybersecurity consulting firm. A Series B fintech startup (raised $30M, 80 employees) wants us to do a full security audit + SOC 2 compliance preparation. This is a 3-month engagement. We've never priced something exactly like this before. What should we charge?

assertions.text: Response includes a floor, target, and stretch price (three-tier price range)
Response considers at least 3 of the 4 pricing lenses: cost, market, value, risk
Response attempts to quantify the value (SOC 2 enables enterprise sales, reduces breach risk, etc.)
Response recommends an engagement structure (phased, project fee, etc.)
Response identifies specific delivery risks (scope ambiguity, existing security posture, regulatory complexity)
Response states assumptions about team composition, scope boundaries, or effort estimates
